data.title: AQA will launch multi-platform IDO on April 11 and 12
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Blockchain project AQA announced that it will launch IDO on Spores Network, Kommunitas and Kingdomstarter on April 11 and 12. 
Previously, AQA held The AQA Digital City Residency Program from March 19 to April 7, with tens of thousands of users participating. AQA has now completed the Snapshot and will issue airdrops, whitelists and cooperation activity permissions to qualified users. 
AQA Digital City is inspired by the physical city system to build a virtual city on the chain, hoping to achieve transparent collaboration with the help of blockchain; users can participate in city DAO governance, mint identity NFTs through DApp, and get incentives by contributing digital public products.

data.title: A whale transferred 1,500 BTC to Binance, equivalent to about $120 million
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to Onchain Lens monitoring, a whale deposited 1,500 BTC to Binance after being silent for 1.5 months, worth about $120.29 million.
The whale still holds 1,486 BTC, worth about $119.76 million.

data.title: A newly created address hoarded $2.294 million worth of PARTI 10 hours ago
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to @ai_9684xtpa monitoring, a newly created address hoarded $2.294 million worth of PARTI 10 hours ago. The address withdrew 13.16 million tokens from Binance at an average price of $0.1743, and currently has a floating loss of $86,000.

data.title: Plastic Labs Completes $5.35 Million Pre-Seed Round of Financing, Led by Variant and Others
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News AI identity solution Plastic Labs announced the completion of a $5.35 million pre-seed round of financing, led by Variant, White Star Capital and Betaworks, with participation from Mozilla Ventures, Greycroft and others. The new funds will be used to recruit talent, drive growth and provide the computing power needed to realize Honcho's full vision.
Plastic Labs is committed to solving personal identity problems for artificial intelligence and has officially launched early access to its AI platform Honcho. Honcho simplifies personalization in interactions, allowing developers to create adaptable LLM applications without complex infrastructure. It combines flexible memory, real-time user insights and natural language APIs to provide the right context for each reasoning.

data.title: An early Ethereum IC0 participant recharged 664 ETH to Kraken again, and sold 4180 ETH in April
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to @ai_9684xtpa, an OG user who participated in Ethereum IC0 in 2015 and held 100,000 ETH has sold a total of 4,180 ETH since April, cashing out about $7.05 million. The address recharged 664 ETH to Kraken 2 hours ago, at a cost of only $0.31 per ETH, and is expected to make a profit of about $1.01 million.

data.title: BNB Surpasses 580 USDT with a 0.05% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Apr 11, 2025, 02:27 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has crossed the 580 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 580.059998 USDT, with a narrowed 0.05% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Security Flaw Detected in Morpho Lending Protocol
data.description: According to Foresight News, Chaofan Shou, co-founder of Web3 security analysis firm Fuzzland, has identified a vulnerability in the front-end of the Morpho lending protocol, specifically in Bundler3. Users are advised to be cautious of potential risks associated with this issue.

data.title: Ethereum Foundation Transfers 1000 ETH for Ecosystem Grants
data.description: According to Foresight News, PeckShieldAlert has reported that the Ethereum Foundation has transferred 1000 ETH, valued at approximately $1.5 million, to a Gnosis Safe Proxy. This move is potentially aimed at funding ecosystem projects.

data.title: Ethereum Foundation transfers another 1,000 ETH, possibly for grants
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to Lookonchain monitoring, the Ethereum Foundation once again transferred 1,000 ETH (worth approximately US$1.53 million) to allocate ecological funding projects.

data.title: A newly created wallet attracted more than 9,600 ETH 7 hours ago
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Spot On Chain monitoring, about 7 hours ago, an address created a new wallet and purchased a total of 9,610 ETH (worth about $14.54 million). The address first withdrew 5,000 ETH from Kraken as collateral, borrowed $7 million USDS on the Spark platform, and then purchased another 4,610 ETH at a price of about $1,518, which seems to be bullish on the future trend of ETH.
